name.full: Org IT Toolkit for M365 Copilot Cowork

description.short: Turn Copilot Cowork consumption logs into FinOps insight reports.
description.full: A FinOps analytics toolkit for IT and admin teams running M365 Copilot Cowork. ai-finops-report turns the exported Neptune/Cowork credit-consumption CSV logs (per-user, per-group, per-service consumption + Cowork task details) into polished insight deliverables — a zh-TW Word narrative, a Power BI-style Excel dashboard, and an interactive HTML dashboard with slicers — centred on a quantified cost-optimization action plan (cap ungoverned spend, reclaim idle licences, break concentration risk, right-size limits). Everything is measured in credits (never a fabricated USD figure). Analyze and optimize spend after the fact.
